item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya berpendapat bahwa pendekatan yang menempatkan kepentingan sosial di atas hak individu bisa mengaburkan nilai-nilai dasar demokrasi.

notes: Agent A opens by agreeing that social interests often take priority in Indonesian society, then shifts toward Agent B's balance/individual-rights frame by turn 3 and explicitly rejects social interests always preceding individual rights by turn 5. Agent B remains mostly balanced throughout, opposing strict societal priority while allowing that societal interests should not never outweigh rights. Notable language artifacts: Agent B includes CJK text in English turns ("忽视", "印尼"), and Agent A uses awkward phrasing such as "Polity" in an Indonesian turn.
